creator: bsd@zuvis.mooo.com
text: On 13.0 firmware was 21.80.16.92 (haven't tried any other firmware versions). I'm not 100% sure, but I think it was 13.0-RELEASE (updated since then to 13.0-RELEASE-p6, but didn't tried to reproduce the bug). With applied iflib.override_* as reported before I don't see bnxt0 errors.
